title: BSA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Board of Standards & Appeals (BSA) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the BSA Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/bsa, and the PDF application forms. Includes the NYC geography/property spine (BBL, BIN, block/lot, zoning district) and BSA's calendar-number key.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

PropertyReference.description: The NYC property/zoning-lot spine that identifies the premises of a BSA case.

CalendarReference.description: A reference to a BSA case by its calendar number — the Board's primary case key (e.g. '2024-26-BZ', '246-98-BZII', '6-16-S').

suffix.description: Application-type suffix ('C3'), e.g. BZ, BZY, A, S, SOC.

ApplicationType.description: BSA application/case type. BZ = variance/special-permit (Board Zoning); BZY = extension of time / vested rights; SOC = Special Order Calendar (amendment/extension of a prior grant); Appeal = appeal of a DOB/agency determination; S = legacy special-permit calendar suffix.

CaseStatus.description: Disposition of a decided BSA case.
